llm_values.evidence: In step 7, the agent attempts to "set the title of slide 2" by triple-clicking the text box that says "Introduction" on the canvas. However, the Layouts panel (bottom right) shows this slide uses a "Blank" layout, meaning the text is just an arbitrary custom shape/text box, not the structural Slide Title property. Modifying it does not change the actual title of the slide.
llm_values.correction: The agent should have either right-clicked the Slide 2 thumbnail in the left pane and selected 'Rename Slide' to change the slide's actual name/title, or changed the slide's layout to one with a 'Title' placeholder before entering the text.
